entities.mother: a mother in a rocking chair
entities.baby: a baby wrapped in a blanket

scenes.title: The Nursery
scenes.background_prompt: A pastel-colored nursery with a wooden crib, a rocking chair, a mobile with stars and moons, and soft lamp light. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A pastel-colored nursery in soft warm lamp light. A mother with gentle features and her hair in a loose ponytail, wearing a cream-colored cardigan, sits in a white wooden rocking chair near the window. She cradles a baby wrapped snugly in a pale yellow blanket, the baby's tiny hand curled around her finger. The mother looks down at the baby with a tender, overwhelmed expression — her eyes soft and full, her lips parted in a quiet smile. A white wooden crib with a star-patterned bumper stands to the right. A mobile of felt stars and crescent moons in pastel blue and gold hangs above the crib, gently turning. A small bookshelf holds children's board books. The walls are painted a soft mint green.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place mother in the white rocking chair near the window, sitting and cradling baby wrapped in pale yellow blanket. Baby's tiny hand curled around her finger. Mother looks down with tender expression, eyes soft, lips in quiet smile.
scenes.scene_description: On the far left, a large green tree with rounded foliage stands against a light green wall. In front of the tree, a green rug patterned with small white flowers and green clovers covers the wooden floor. A brown wooden crib sits on the left side of the rug, with a light blue blanket featuring yellow stars draped over its front rail. Above the crib, a wooden mobile hangs from the ceiling, adorned with white clouds, yellow stars, and blue crescent moons. In the center of the scene, a large arched window reveals a background of rolling green hills, scattered trees, and a bright blue sky with white clouds. The mother sits in a dark brown wooden rocking chair positioned in front of the window. She has long brown hair tied back, wears a blue cardigan over a yellow floral dress, and is barefoot. She is cradling the baby, who is wrapped in a green swaddle with yellow patterns and has its eyes closed. To the right of the mother, a second wooden rocking chair with a cream-colored seat and back cushion has a blue and white checkered blanket draped over its right armrest. On the right wall, two wooden shelves are mounted one above the other. The top shelf holds three books in blue, yellow, and green, alongside a small woven basket. The bottom shelf holds three books in green, blue, and pink, next to a white storage bin with a handle. The entire room is bathed in soft, even light, suggesting a peaceful daytime setting.
